records.summary: deacon exposes a host-side port-forward daemon (a superset the reference CLI does not provide).
deacon can inject host CA certificates into its TLS trust store (a superset the reference CLI does not provide).
deacon applies a user-defined profile from settings.json (a superset the reference CLI does not provide).
deacon's --secrets-file accepts both JSON and a .env-format file (a superset the reference CLI does not model).
deacon gates host-side lifecycle hooks behind an explicit workspace-trust opt-in (a protection the reference CLI does not provide).
